evidencePacket.rollbackPlan: Restore machine-level UX policy backup before any future mutation.
evidencePacket.afterEvidencePlaceholder: Future after-state packet required before execution can be approved.
evidencePacket.independentVerificationPlaceholder: Future independent verification packet required before execution can be approved.
evidencePacket.privacyRedactionStatement: Machine identity and local paths are redacted.
evidencePacket.failurePropagation: Any missing machine evidence keeps the decision blocked.
